prompt: What's the status of the advanced distillation project? Give me a checklist of everything that still needs to be done, ordered by priority.
assertions: Has at least 4 distinct priority levels or numbered sections
Covers the defensive fixes: minilm_relation_heads validation, attention check, __init__.py, .gitignore
Covers unit tests as a missing item
Covers the BERT refactor including code duplication and MiniLMv2 forward pass
Covers future features from README (GKD, sequence-level, DPO, TAKD, LoRA or similar)
Items are ordered by priority: quick fixes first, future features last
References specific file paths in the advanced/ folder
